@if (!isHidden) {
@if (parseError) {
{{ 'com.amar.helix-vibe-studio.view-components.org-chart.parse-error' | translate }}: {{ parseError }}
} @else if (!chart?.nodes?.length) {
{{ 'com.amar.helix-vibe-studio.view-components.org-chart.empty' | translate }}
} @else {
@for (id of renderIds; track id) { @if (layoutBoxes.get(id); as box) {
} }

{{ 'com.amar.helix-vibe-studio.view-components.org-chart.detail-title' | translate }}

@if (selectedNode(); as sn) {
{{ sn.name }}
@for (row of detailRows(); track row.label) {
{{ row.label }} {{ row.value }}
} } @else {

{{ 'com.amar.helix-vibe-studio.view-components.org-chart.detail-hint' | translate }}

}
} @if (contextMenu && actionsList().length) {
@for (act of actionsList(); track act.id) { }
}
}
